description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.14` extracts inline sidebar selectors and per-spec
sidebar helpers into one canonical module. Once the expand step
(`bsm-kia.14.1`) lands, each spec can swap its inline selectors
and local helpers for imports one spec at a time. Doing this in
batches-sized-by-file keeps the suite green between commits and
means a future sidebar markup change touches one helper file.

This sub-issue covers the migration for `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` only.

## What to build

Replace every inline `[aria-label='Workspace']` selector and
every local `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` /
`expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent` in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` with imports
from `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts`. The spec's behavior and
assertions stay byte-for-byte equivalent; only the source of the
selectors and helpers changes.

## Technical Approach

- Add an import for `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts` at the
  top of `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- Delete every literal selector string of the form
  `[aria-label='Workspace'] ...` in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- Delete every local `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` /
  `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent` helper declaration in
  `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- Replace each call site with the corresponding import from
  `helpers/sidebar.ts` (`expectCurrentWorkspace`,
  `expectNoCurrentWorkspace`, or
  `expectRememberedWorkspace`).
- Leave the WebDriverIO imports (`browser`, `$`) untouched.

## Considerations

- The selector inside `helpers/sidebar.ts` is the single source of
  truth for the sidebar selector; do not duplicate it.
- If `bsm-kia.13` (Duplicated Code) and `bsm-kia.14` (Shotgun
  Surgery) are being landed together, this migrate step is the
  right place to import both `helpers/rpc.ts` and
  `helpers/sidebar.ts`.
- The behavior, ordering, and assertion count in `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
  must not change.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` imports the sidebar helpers from
      `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts`.
- [ ] No `[aria-label='Workspace']` selector literal remains in
      `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- [ ] No local `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` or
      `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent` declaration remains in
      `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`.
- [ ] The spec's `it()` count, assertion count, and behavior
      match the previous version exactly.
- [ ] `rg "\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent" e2e/issue-list/issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm test` and `pnpm exec ultracite check` — both must
  pass.
- Run the targeted scenario for this file:
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:success` for
    `issue-list.success.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:empty` for `issue-list.empty.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:atomic-switch` for
    `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts`
  - `pnpm e2e:issue-list:restoration` for
    `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts`
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` to prove no scenario
  regression.
title: Migrate issue-list.restoration.spec.ts to helpers/sidebar.ts
